title: AMAYA BIG SKY CAPITAL ANNOUNCES RESIGNATION OF DIRECTOR
description: Vancouver, B.C., June 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Amaya Big Sky Capital Corp. (“Amaya” or the “Company”) (TSX-V: AMYA.P) announces that Arne Gulstene has resigned as a director of the Company. The Board sincerely thanks Mr. Gulstene for his contributions over the years and wishes him well in his future endeavours.
